capsules.content:
Gene: gene_gep_repair_from_errors (repair)

Signals: perf_bottleneck

Strategy:
1. Extract structured signals from logs and user instructions
2. Select an existing Gene by signals match (no improvisation)
3. Estimate blast radius (files, lines) before editing
4. Apply smallest reversible patch
5. Validate using declared validation steps; rollback on failure
6. Solidify knowledge: append EvolutionEvent, update Gene/Capsule store

Scope: 5 file(s), 256 line(s)

Changed files:
skills/capability-evolver/assets/gep/genes.json
skills/capability-evolver/memory/evolution/evolution_solidify_state.json
skills/capability-evolver/memory/evolution/evolution_state.json
skills/capability-evolver/memory/evolution/memory_graph_state.json
skills/capability-evolver/memory/evolution/personality_state.json

Outcome score: 0.94
